title: helopus pilosus
intro: Helopus pilosus, also known as the hairy helopus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helopus pilosus include its ability to soothe stomach ulcers, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and alleviate symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders.
